login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Get started — it only takes a moment.
register.successMessage: Registration successful! Check your inbox for a verification email. Click the link to verify your address and set your password — you will then be able to log in.

requestPasswordReset.title: Request Password Reset
requestPasswordReset.subtitle: We'll send a reset link to your email if it's registered.
requestPasswordReset.successToast: If the email exists, a reset link has been sent.
requestPasswordReset.hint: You will receive an email with a verification link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account.
resetPassword.createSubtitle: Set a password for your new account.
resetPassword.successMessage: Password reset successfully. Redirecting to home…
resetPassword.createSuccessMessage: Password created successfully. Redirecting to home…
resetPassword.errorMessage: Password reset failed. Please try again.
resetPassword.createErrorMessage: Password creation failed. Please try again.
resetPassword.invalidLink: Invalid or missing verification link. Please request a new reset link.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome: Welcome {{name}}! This is your private home page.

password.title: Password
password.description: Update the password used to sign in to your account.

home.headline: Track your expenses,
home.description: A clean, minimal tool for keeping your finances in check. Sign in to your account or create one — it takes under a minute.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

verifyError.title: Verification link expired
verifyError.description: This email verification link has already been used or has expired. Please register again or request a new verification email.
verifyError.resendSent: A new verification link will be sent shortly. Check your inbox.

apiErrors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.
apiErrors.forbidden: Access denied. You might not have permission.
apiErrors.badRequest: Invalid request. Please check your input.
apiErrors.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
apiErrors.missingParameters: Please fill in all required fields.
apiErrors.noAssignedRole: Your account has no assigned role. Please contact support.
apiErrors.emailVerificationFailed: Email verification failed. Please check the link and try again.
apiErrors.setNewPasswordFailed: Failed to set the new password. Please try again.
apiErrors.requestPasswordResetFailed: Failed to request a password reset. Please try again.
apiErrors.resetPasswordFailed: Failed to reset your password. Please try again.
apiErrors.missingToken: Authentication token is missing. Please log in again.
apiErrors.invalidToken: Invalid authentication token. Please log in again.

families.title: Families
families.subtitle: Manage your family groups and members.
families.inviteHint: The invitee must accept via the link sent to their email.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.firstNameMax: First name must be at most 100 characters.
validation.lastNameMax: Last name must be at most 100 characters.
validation.emailMax: Email must be at most 100 characters.
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.familyNameMax: Family name must be at most 100 characters.
